category_title: Withdrawn student with receptive language delay
scenario_title: Expressing emotions during personal story gathering
minimal_context: The student is using an iPad app in a one-to-one session to create a personal story about a recent achievement.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's use the 'Our Story' app on the iPad to tell a personal story about an achievement. Please start by telling me what happened when you presented to your class.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Manipulates the app independently to sequence and save content) I went to the front of the class. I read my work.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Okay, you went to the front and read your work. How did you feel when you did that?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Appears withdrawn and self-contained) I stood there. The teacher listened. Then I sat down.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Try to tell me about your feelings. Were you happy or scared?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Remains withdrawn, avoiding the question about feelings) I finished reading. Will you keep it? Will it be on the iPad forever?

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's use the 'Our Story' app on the iPad to tell a personal story about an achievement. Please start by telling me what happened when you presented to your class.

STUDENT: (Manipulates the app independently to sequence and save content) I went to the front of the class. I read my work.

TUTOR: Okay, you went to the front and read your work. How did you feel when you did that?

STUDENT: (Appears withdrawn and self-contained) I stood there. The teacher listened. Then I sat down.

TUTOR: Try to tell me about your feelings. Were you happy or scared?

STUDENT: (Remains withdrawn, avoiding the question about feelings) I finished reading. Will you keep it? Will it be on the iPad forever?

task.content: Tell a personal story about an achievement, a target reached, or a wish for the future
task.learning_goal: Compose a multimodal story and express feelings about the story

context.time_context: During the initial 'gathering' stage of story development

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When the story was first presented
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Presented as a straightforward reportage-style list of what happened when Sally presented to her class, with little emotional content; could appear as withdrawn and self-contained
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Had difficulties in expressing her feelings

behavior_patterns.condition: When asked to share personal experiences that she found challenging
